title: BEM-872 append roadmap
objective:
Append to governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM872_ROADMAP_AGREEMENT_RESPONSE.md: 
Roadmap:
- P0 Reliability: Claude runtime proof, workflow lint-gate, idempotency, checkpoint/resume, Runtime Registry v2, curator-mediated mailbox.
- P1 Role runtime: role contracts, role runners, board/director registry, product registry, direct GitHub API path with rights control.
- P2 Business pilots: one Director contour and one Worker contour execute a real business-domain pilot end-to-end using Business Model Canvas.
- P3 Scale: product repos, multi-client SLA, external storage only when file registry is limiting, interaction logging and evaluation dashboards.
No issue comments.
